falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a 12% increase from current levels) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed blowoff top pattern, contradicting the 'hold' signal and suggesting a rapid bullish climax rather than a bottoming process

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of Bitcoin's trading volume exceeds 200% of the 2024 August bottom's volume levels
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume surge would confirm extreme market participation characteristic of a blowoff phase, invalidating the current 'unknown' verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index drops below 12 for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate extreme market complacency, directly contradicting the blowoff score's implication of imminent volatility and invalidating the hold signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
